item.title: Greyhound bus driver found not guilty over horror Queensland crash killing three on Bruce Highway near Gumlu
item.description: A Queenslander and two German tourists died when the bus collided with a 4WD towing a caravan.

item.title: WA Budget: Free fuel and family handouts as state posts big surplus
item.description: More than two million motorists will benefit.

item.title: Former Australian Test batter Marcus North set to be appointed England national selector
item.description: It is the first time an Australian has held such a key role in England’s inner-sanctum.

item.title: Forgotten Aussie tennis star Alexei Popyrin returns with a bang in Italian Open
item.description: The Australian No.2 has been going through tennis hell, and even stepped away from the game.

item.title: Family update on toddler left fighting for life after inhaling metallic cake decorating powder
item.description: Young Dustin fell critically ill in a terrifying ordeal for his parents.

item.title: Celebrated naturalist David Attenborough turns 100
item.description: The filmmaker and conservationist has revealed his favourite place on the planet.

item.title: Prince George, Princess Charlotte and Prince Louis choose ‘brilliant name’ for new kangaroo joey at Australia Zoo
item.description: The latest collaboration further highlights the growing bond between the two families.

item.title: Matildas rising star Jada Whyman anounces ‘very sad’ decision to pause career amid knee injury struggles
item.description: A lengthy silence has been broken after a ‘freak’ accident cruelled the biggest moment of her career.

item.title: Meghan Markle shares new pictures of Prince Harry with their son Archie for his 7th birthday
item.description: The Duchess of Sussex also revealed a sweet glimpse into the children’s favourite TV shows.

item.title: Patti Newton reveals touching final promise she made to late husband Bert Newton
item.description: The veteran performer also opened up about her blossoming friendship with a fellow iconic star.

item.title: Queensland students unable to submit assignments after cyber attack forces shutdown of QLearn and Canvas
item.description: Hackers accessed data linked to 1300 schools, leaving thousands scrambling to submit assignments and access coursework.

item.title: Russia and Ukraine agree to three-day ceasefire as Donald Trump confirms major prisoner exchange
item.description: The truce comes as peace talks stall and both sides continue accusing each other of violating past ceasefires.

item.title: Mother’s Day joy for family of Perth boy Cruz Kelly fighting rare brain tumour
item.description: As he battles a rare and aggressive brain cancer, Cruz Kelly has taught his mum the power in seeking out joy during times of deep sadness and fear.

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor set to give evidence in UK court after man accused of threatening behaviour near Sandringham estate
item.description: A man accused of intimidating Andrew near the Sandringham estate has been banned from approaching royal residences before the high-profile trial.

item.title: Spain prepares emergency evacuation of more than 140 passengers from hantavirus-stricken cruise ship after three deaths onboard
item.description: Authorities are scrambling to trace passengers across multiple countries after the deadly outbreak onboard the MV Hondius.

item.title: Bathurst seeks $70 million for Mount Panorama upgrades
item.description: A funding push for upgrades to the Mount Panorama circuit has been put forward after years of setbacks for the hallowed venue.

item.title: Alex de Minaur reduced to racquet-smashing frustration as alarming slump continues at Italian Open
item.description: It was another dispiriting setback for the Aussie as he clumped to a three-year low.

item.title: NSW pours $39.3m into Firearms Registry to enforce tough new gun laws after Bondi terror attack
item.description: It follows the state introducing the toughest gun law reforms in the wake of the terror tragedy.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Mortgage change that could save you $11,000 in two years as interest rates rise again
item.description: One financial expert says Aussies should take a day off work to make the change.

item.title: Hundreds of Brisbane teens run riot after failed Scientology ‘speedrun’ attempt
item.description: A viral TikTok trend has sparked chaos with hundreds of teenagers storming the streets after attempting to breach the church.

item.title: Former Ironman champion Guy Leech launches new longevity program for everyday Australians
item.description: ‘There’s no magic bullet when it comes to health.’

item.title: 11 babies in 12 months: Inside the growing 7NEWS Melbourne family balancing breaking news and parenthood this Mother’s Day
item.description: To celebrate Mother’s Day, eight members of the team came together for a special newsroom photoshoot with their babies.

item.title: Warning for all women this Mother’s Day as fit mum of four rushed in for emergency heart surgery: ‘Check your heart’
item.description: The cyclist went for tests after a friend suffered a cardiac arrest. Within days, she was rushed into open heart surgery.

item.title: Simone Callahan opens up about moment she found out Shane Warne died, son Jackson makes devastating admission
item.description: The family has opened up, revealing devastating details about his death.

item.title: Sydney-based small business owner extorted over fake one-star Google reviews
item.description: ‘It‘s not right the way Google controls it and doesn’t really care.’

item.title: Mary Fowler miracle strike sparks devastation for benched Sam Kerr as all-Aussie FA Cup final set
item.description: Goal-scoring star Sam Kerr was helpless as Chelsea coughed up a semi-final win after she was pulled from the pitch.

item.title: Aussie Lucas Herbert overcomes illness to win $5.5m LIV Golf Virginia title and US Open berth
item.description: ‘I woke up this morning probably feeling worse than I did the last few days.’

item.title: Middle East war: Trump rejects Iran’s proposal to end war and reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran’s response to a US-issued peace deal did not sit well with the US president.

item.title: Dua Lipa sues Samsung Electronics for $US15 million over unauthorised use of her image on TV boxes
item.description: The singer could be in line for a huge payout.

item.title: Aussie tennis greats pay tribute as much-loved champion Mal Anderson dies aged 91
item.description: ‘Tennis in Australia has lost one of its greats, and a lot of us have lost a mate and mentor. I feel very lucky to have known him.’

item.title: Teen prodigy Ollie Peake earns ‘exciting’ first call-up to Aussie ODI squad for Pakistan tour
item.description: The 19-year-old is in the mix for an international debut while Glenn Maxwell is out as he focuses on franchise cricket.

item.title: Nicole Kidman questioned after leaving older children Bella and Connor out of Mother’s Day post
item.description: The mother-of-four’s latest post has come under scrutiny over a glaring detail.

item.title: 'ISIS brides' on slavery charges to remain behind bars as bid for freedom postponed
item.description: The women have been charged with crimes against humanity and slavery offences.

item.title: Keli Holiday ‘detained’ at US-Canadian border, forcing singer to cancel New York show
item.description: ‘I’m still trying to get clarity on the situation.’

item.title: Debate rages as Scott Pendlebury set to cash in on record-breaking game: ‘Giant loophole’
item.description: The champion is likely to earn ‘over six figures’ in a controversial move that has been ticked off by the AFL.

item.title: Queensland’s DNA lab clears backlog of hundreds of sexual assault kits after major delays
item.description: ‘These figures are not just statistics — they represent real people who have fallen victim to serious crime.’

item.title: Carlton and coach Michael Voss part ways amid season from hell
item.description: The nightmare is over for the AFL great following two years of ferocious scrutiny.

item.title: Aussie prodigy Emerson Jones steps up to French Open main draw with last wildcard
item.description: The 17-year-old former world No.1 junior has booked an early flight to seek a leg up in Paris.

item.title: Federal budget 2026: Finance minister’s admission as sweeping property tax reforms to mark broken election promise
item.description: Katy Gallagher has explained why Aussies will see a government backflip in tonight’s budget.

item.title: Abbie Chatfield issues lengthy apology for resurfaced video days after Keli Holiday was detained in the US
item.description: ‘People have said that I’ve called for the assassination of Trump.’

item.title: Runway CCTV captures moment man walks into path of passenger jet before fatal engine strike in Denver
item.description: The newly released vision is raising fresh questions about how the man reached the active runway undetected.

item.title: Australian passengers hit with new roadblock as delays plague plans to repatriation flights
item.description: The update comes as Aussie passengers face delays returning home.

item.title: Delta Goodrem at Eurovision 2026: Singer reveals ‘surprise’ details from Eclipse performance
item.description: ‘It’s been very hard to hold these things back.’

item.title: Man arrested after alleged Armaguard robbery at Eli Waters shopping centre near Hervey Bay
item.description: The incident occurred as guards were transporting cash from a van to an ATM.

item.title: Budget 2026 live: Treasurer Jim Chalmers hands down Labor’s fifth federal budget
item.description: Jim Chalmers has delivered what he calls the ‘most important and ambitious’ budget in decades. Here’s what others say.

item.title: Google down: Search engine plagued with server errors as thousands report issues
item.description: The problem has yet to be addressed by the search engine provider.

item.title: Pauline Hanson unleashes on Tim Wilson after vow to ‘never ever’ support a One Nation/Liberal Coalition
item.description: The One Nation leader has promised the party is ready to go it alone after the shadow treasurer turned away from a potential alliance.

item.title: Why only Aussie one state will have restaurants ranked in the prestigious Michelin Guide for the first time
item.description: Anonymous inspectors have arrived in Australia for the first time to find the best eateries.

item.title: Federal Budget 2026: Cancer and cerebral palsy medications added to PBS as government unveils $1.8b urgent care boost
item.description: Medicare Urgent Care Clinics, cheaper medicines and aged care reforms are at the centre of the package.

item.title: Federal Budget 2026-27: The winners and losers revealed
item.description: Jim Chalmers has handed down his fifth budget, one he said is the ‘most important and ambitious’ in decades.

item.title: AFL champion Luke Hodge steps down from All-Australian selection panel due to link to betting giant
item.description: ‘I thought it was the best thing to do after speaking to the AFL.’

item.title: Welsh singer Bonnie Tyler 'remains seriously ill' but stable after emergency surgery
item.description: Her doctors are positive about the Holding Out for a Hero singer’s recovery.

item.title: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer defies 'destabilising' calls to quit
item.description: ‘The country expects us to get on with governing. That is what I am doing.’

item.title: NBA world ‘heartbroken’ as Memphis Grizzlies veteran Brandon Clarke found dead aged 29
item.description: Authorities are investigating as the league mourns ‘an outstanding teammate and even better person’.

item.title: Unfiltered: Bradley Hill opens up on ‘uncomfortable’ conversation with Ross Lyon after casual racism comment
item.description: ‘We all had a big hug, there’s a little bit of tears going around and I’ve got so much respect for Ross.’

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Search efforts resume for missing SA mother Trisha Graf as detectives flock to fringe of Andamooka
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Federal budget 2026: Anthony Albanese and Jim Chalmers defend broken election promise in ambitious budget
item.description: The PM has faced a grilling over changes to a key housing policy in the budget.

item.title: Middle East war: Trump sparks backlash with remarks about cost of living amid Iran talks
item.description: The US president has been accused of ‘saying the quiet part out loud’.

item.title: Trailblazing NBA star Jason Collins dies from aggressive brain tumour, aged 47
item.description: ‘He was an inspiration to all who knew him and to those who admired him from afar.’

item.title: Hantavirus could be more contagious than once believed as more cruise passengers fall ill
item.description: New findings appear to conflict with earlier assumptions about how the deadly strain spreads.

item.title: Major legislation shake-up introduced to NT Parliament after death of Kumanjayi Little Baby
item.description: ‘The ongoing cycle of harm, risk and uncertainty needs to be addressed’.

item.title: Broncos star trio Reece Walsh, Ezra Mam and Ben Hunt get final chance to impress ahead of Origin
item.description: The big guns will all play on Sunday, just hours before Maroons selectors pick their squad.

item.title: Outrage over hike to overseas travel taxes set to hit Australian tourism operators and holidaymakers
item.description: ‘This could really be the straw that breaks the camel’s back.’

item.title: Ivan Cleary confirms 2027 will be his final year as Penrith Panthers coach
item.description: The shock decision comes despite the four-time premiership coach enjoying another brilliant season.

item.title: Fallout over war in Gaza overshadows Eurovision’s opening ceremony as multiple countries boycott song contest
item.description: Israel's Eurovision entry sailed through to the finals despite the backlash.

item.title: Thousands of dental patients in Strathfield urged to get tested for blood-borne viruses
item.description: Patients seen over more than 20 years are being urged to get checked.

item.title: Legendary jockey Glen Boss joins Seven for Queensland Racing Carnival
item.description: ‘Viewers are set for back-to-back weeks of unbelievable racing.’

item.title: Heartwarming update as toddler who inhaled gold cake dust now breathing ‘completely on his own’
item.description: The boy was put in a coma after the decorative powder thickened in his lungs.

item.title: Wins for women: Endometriosis clinics, paid parental leave, and domestic violence funding at heart of budget push
item.description: ‘For too long, women’s health policy wasn’t taken seriously. The government has changed that.’

item.title: Four long-running Gold Coast Boost Juice stores close after franchise operator goes into liquidation
item.description: Some stores had been open more than 20 years, while the family behind them is also selling a waterfront mansion once home to AFL players.

item.title: Singer Cody Simpson suffers serious injury to his vocal cords, cancels performances and faces possible surgery
item.description: The singer says he has been ordered into weeks of silence.

item.title: Indigenous groups slam sweeping child safety reforms following death of Kumanjayi Little Baby
item.description: ‘Lowering the threshold will deepen an already devastating crisis.’

item.title: Panthers outline plan to keep superstar Nathan Cleary in wake of Ivan Cleary bombshell
item.description: The playmaker is out of contract at the end of 2027 when his father will finish up as coach.

item.title: Brisbane abandons plan to return short-stay holiday homes to rental market ahead of Olympics
item.description: Hundreds of booking platform hosts had feared losing the right to keep renting out their properties.

item.title: Australian researchers use artificial intelligence to detect heart disease years before heart attack
item.description: A simple scan could save your life.

item.title: Australian cruise passengers stranded in Netherlands after evacuating hantavirus hit MV Hondius to return home
item.description: The group of six has faced days of uncertainty after evacuating the hantavirus infected cruise.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: More than 1700 passengers stranded on British cruise ship amid gastro outbreak
item.description: The ship was on a 14-night journey when the illness was discovered.

item.title: Toby Greene move from GWS Giants to Victorian club not out of the question
item.description: He’s one of the most loyal people in the game, but three key factors could force his hand.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Alleged kidnapping attempt rocks Sydney; man shot in stomach
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Federal budget 2026: Coalition reveals plan to block migrants from Centrelink welfare payments in budget response
item.description: Non-citizens currently have access to 17 different welfare payments on various waiting times.

item.title: Middle East war: Israel continues devastating attacks on Lebanon despite ceasefire agreement
item.description: Numerous towns and villages have been reduced to rubble in the weeks since the ceasefire was signed.

item.title: Fremantle coach Justin Longmuir lifts lid on Wharfie Time button that ‘spooks the opposition’
item.description: ‘It clearly helps us as a team.’

item.title: Dragons winger Mat Feagai shares ‘scary’ details of moment his legs stopped working
item.description: ‘I was like, ‘I need to find my legs’, but I just couldn’t, I couldn’t move.’

item.title: 2026 Renault Master: New-gen diesel and electric van priced for Australia
item.description: Renault Australia has announced pricing for its new-generation Master van, and it's only slightly more expensive than the outgoing version.

item.title: Audi A2 e-tron: New entry-level EV on the cards for Australia
item.description: Growing EV sales in Australia could help bring the upcoming A2 electric hatchback here, with Audi spying an opportunity among novated lessees.

item.title: Former Carlton list manager Nick Austin considers legal options after ‘brutal blindside’
item.description: ‘Five minutes is all it took.’

item.title: Western Bulldogs ‘treading warily’ with Tim English concussion
item.description: ‘We don’t know because of his history.’

item.title: Federal budget 2026: Government responds as call for boost to Centrelink payments goes unheard
item.description: An advisory committee identified a ‘critical need’ among recipients for the increase.

item.title: 'Rough is pretty gnarly': Golfers brace for major test at PGA Championship in Pennsylvania
item.description: Six Aussies are in the field and expecting a fierce challenge in the second major of the year.

item.title: Australian Test batter Marcus North explains decision to become England selector
item.description: The 46-year-old Melburnian’s use of one interesting word will not go unnoticed back home.

item.title: 2026 AFL fixture: Carlton and Essendon off-Broadway as AFL releases game times for Round 16-22
item.description: The AFL has unveiled its prime-time darlings for the remainder of the 2026 season.

item.title: Alex Murdaugh: Juror who helped convict former lawyer shocked by decision to overturn guilty verdict
item.description: The disgraced former lawyer will now face a new trial in the killings of his wife and son.

item.title: Bombshell Federal Court case rules Coles misled shoppers in ‘Down Down’ campaign
item.description: The Australian supermarket giant has been caught red-handed.

item.title: Lachie Neale affair scandal: Tess Crosley rebrands in fresh Instagram move after two couples split
item.description: The woman at the centre of the former Brisbane Lions captain’s affair scandal spoke out amid ‘unnecessary hostility and cruelty’.

item.title: Russia bombards Ukrainian capital Kyiv during ‘massive attack’ from drones and missiles
item.description: The missile and drone attack struck buildings in different districts of the city, including in residential areas.

item.title: Gold Coast coach Damien Hardwick blasts journo over repeated questions about staffer’s gambling link
item.description: The uncomfortable questions kept coming and coming until Damien Hardwick just snapped.

item.title: Alastair Clarkson speaks out on ‘disturbing’ effect of coach axings in wake of Michael Voss departure
item.description: ‘It’s a pretty uncomfortable time for everyone in the industry.’

item.title: Maserati working with China's JAC, Huawei on new models – report
item.description: A partnership between Maserati, automaker JAC, and tech giant Huawei could see an electric Maserati exported from China to the rest of the world.

item.title: Electric Volkswagen Golf delayed until 2030, says CEO
item.description: The highly anticipated and critical new electric Volkswagen Golf has been delayed, pushing its introduction out to the end of the decade.

item.title: Rabbitohs star Latrell Mitchell cleared for pivotal battle against Dolphins gun Jack Bostock
item.description: Latrell Mitchell is fit to play, but won’t handle kicking duties.

item.title: Warriors coach Andrew Webster rejects ‘dumb’ Luke Metcalf idea as speculation on his NRL future
item.description: The 27-year-old has been sidelined by his current club as he seeks out a new home.

item.title: Teens plead not guilty over alleged stabbing deaths of Chol Achiek and Dau Akueng in Cobblebank, Melbourne
item.description: Chol Achiek and Dau Akueng were allegedly ambushed while walking home from basketball.

item.title: Bruce Highway closed after bus rollover crash at Gumlu in north Queensland leaves multiple passengers injured
item.description: The crash comes just a week after a driver was found not guilty over a crash in the same area that killed three.

item.title: BYD Atto 1 gets LiDAR tech with Chinese-market update
item.description: Australia’s cheapest electric vehicle has been upgraded in China, receiving minor design tweaks and new LiDAR technology.

item.title: BYD V9: Huge EV poised to tackle Mercedes-Benz Sprinter and Ford Transit in Australia
item.description: BYD looks set to re-enter the van market in Australia with a full-size electric van developed to take on Europe's best.
